notes: SHIP v1.14.209 — LOG NOTE QUICK CHIPS: site-editable tap/long-press chips in the rack Log Note prompt (stripeRack_logNote via phantomPromptAsk). A .pql wrap row renders above the input with 12 locked default chips (status/blocker/outcome/handoff phrases). TAP a chip = pre-fill the note box (replace when empty, append with '; ' when not), focus + cursor to end, no submit — tech adds detail then OK. LONG-PRESS (500ms) = instant log: fires deploy_logAudit(deployId,'RACK_NOTE','rack',rackId,label.slice(0,500)) + haptic [8,30,8] + toast 'Note logged to <rack>' + closes the sheet (resolves null so the awaiting caller does NOT re-log). Press timer cancels on pointercancel (scroll) / pointerleave so a scroll can't misfire; hold path sets held=true so the release doesn't also tap. Chips are SITE-EDITABLE (phantom_lognote_chips_v1, same override shape as the phase checklist): + adds via prompt(), EDIT mode shows a red x per chip (default->removed, user item->deleted) + tap-to-rename; resolver = defaults - removed, renamed applied, + added. phantomPromptAsk extended opts-gated (opts.chips/chipStore/onChipTap/onChipHold) — non-breaking: every other prompt caller leaves them undefined and gets the ORIGINAL sheet verbatim. Audit schema UNCHANGED (still RACK_NOTE strings, <=500 chars). Redesign-only: stripeRack_logNote passes chips ONLY under redesign_isOn(); ?legacy=1 log-note prompt = no chip row, byte-identical. CSS: one body.rd-scoped .pql-* block before main </style>; chips use padding-box-safe styling, -webkit-touch-callout:none to kill the iOS long-press callout. Every chip label escaped (textContent / escHtml path); rename reads label via lognoteChips_labelOf, never through an attribute; instant-log label sliced to 500 to match the typed path (no double-log — hold clears the timer + resolves null). Gates: node --check x4 inline blocks, CSS brace balance, CRLF preserved, three-stamp lockstep .208->.209. ROLLBACK: git revert. SHIP-ORDER NOTE: spec gated after checklist v1; this is the 8th ship in the open BATCH-VERIFY batch (.202-.209) — 2 past the 6-cap, owner continued the stack 2026-07-08. DEVICE-VERIFY CHECKLIST: (1) Work>Deploy>rack: action stripe LOG NOTE opens the prompt; a chip wrap row shows above the input. (2) Tap a chip -> its label fills the box, cursor at end, keyboard focus; tap a 2nd -> appends with '; '. (3) Long-press a chip ~0.5s -> logs instantly (haptic + 'Note logged to <rack>' toast), sheet closes, NO typed note needed; confirm the audit trail shows exactly ONE RACK_NOTE (no double-log). (4) Start a long-press then scroll/drag off -> nothing logs (no misfire). (5) + -> prompt adds a chip that appears here AND next time (site-scoped); EDIT -> red x removes (default hidden / user deleted), tap label renames; DONE exits. (6) Typed-note flow still works normally (type, OK -> logs). (7) ?legacy=1: LOG NOTE prompt has NO chip row and behaves exactly as before.
